description: §18.0.2 — an `<onTransition>` element inside a block-`<match>` arm body SHALL fire E-MATCH-ONTRANSITION-FORBIDDEN. `<onTransition>` is engine-only — transitions do not occur in a read-only match — so the diagnostic steers to `<engine for=Type initial=.Variant>` (Tier 2). Regression guard: a match arm renders per current variant; it never fires transition handlers.
rationale: §18.0.2: `<onTransition>` appearing inside a `<match>` arm body is a compile error (E-MATCH-ONTRANSITION-FORBIDDEN) — transition handlers are engine-only. Use `<engine for=Type initial=.Variant>` for transition handlers.
